_comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for docs/security/measurements.md. Edit THIS file, then run
`python3 infra/transparency/gen-measurements.py` to regenerate the doc. A test
doc does not match what this source generates — so the measurements table
cannot drift or be hand-edited undetectably (Apple-PCC req #5, Confer).
Values are the REAL pinned tuple captured live 2026-06-03 from the running
caladon-gw CVM; see provenance.evidence for the on-disk artifacts they came from.
doc_status: SEEDED (chat Agent CVM, dev-pinned) — schema + policy defined; the first real **dev-pinned** tuple is recorded from the live `caladon-gw` v1 gateway CVM (2026-06-03, §2.1). Remaining tuples are seeded as those enclave images are produced; all graduate to reproducible at Phase 5.
owner: Agent G (registry/doc) with **C** (CVM measurements) and **E** (inference measurements); **D** consumes the pinned set; **H** tests pinning fail-closed.

pinning_policy_summary.note: dstack derives app_id per deployment and rtmr3 binds the app-id/compose-hash/instance-id event log, so a redeploy changes app_id + rtmr3 even with an identical compose. mrtd/rtmr0..2 + compose_hash + os-image-hash are the stable identity.

chat_gateway_v1.label: chat / gateway-v1 (direct attested inference, no Letta) — `caladon-gw`, dstack 0.5.x, `tdx.small`.
chat_gateway_v1.captured: Captured live 2026-06-03 from the running CVM (`infra/spikes/gw-v1-live/cvm-attestation.json`). Compose: `infra/cvm/dstack-compose.gw-v1.yml`. **dev-pinned / not-yet-reproducible** (image is pinned by tag `:gw-v1`, not digest — digest-pin is a follow-up; Phase-5 reproducible-build ref TBD).
chat_gateway_v1.component: Agent CVM (gateway v1, + dstack-ingress for gw.caladon.ai)
chat_gateway_v1.os_image_note: **production (`--no-dev-os`)** — root SSH break-glass REFUSED (verified: ssh → "Connection closed", not connectable). Apple-PCC req #3 (no privileged runtime access).
chat_gateway_v1.domain: `gw.caladon.ai` (LE cert provisioned in-CVM via dstack-ingress DNS-01; CAA-locked to this TEE)

chat_full_backbone.label: chat / full-backbone Agent CVM (Letta + Postgres + embeddings) — `infra/cvm/dstack-compose.yml`

inference_enclave._section_note: Phala/Redpill: Intel TDX + NVIDIA H100 CC; Tinfoil/NEAR fallback

reproducible_build_hashes._note: Phase-5 reproducible-build artifact hashes. The enclave images + iOS client a reviewer rebuilds from public source and confirms against the pinned measurement (reproducible-builds.md §2). EMPTY until Phase 5; published as a signed transparency-log entry alongside the pinned tuple so a stranger can verify the chain source→hash→measurement.

gateway_image.digest_status: PARTIAL — full digest pin is a follow-up (image pinned by tag, not digest; RESULT.md operational notes)

provenance.note: rtmr3 + app_id are deploy-specific; the values here are the CURRENTLY-PINNED tuple (§2.1). Older deploys in RESULT.md show different rtmr3/app_id — expected per the pinning policy.
